rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §1.010 prohibits regulation of home schools by educational agencies. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: The Texas Education Agency, the State Board of Education, or any other educational institution described by Section 1.001(a) may not adopt a rule or policy that regulates an educational program of a home school.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed property-tax change.
